title: EarthMC
body:
# 🌍 EarthMc – The Official CobbleStudio Modpack
EarthMc is a Minecraft modpack designed to bring together and showcase all the mods developed by CobbleStudio into a single, cohesive, and comprehensive experience.

## 🧱 About the modpack:
EarthMc isn't just a collection of mods: it's a platform designed to offer a rich, balanced, and personalized adventure based around CobbleStudio's creations. Each included mod has been carefully integrated to ensure optimal compatibility and seamless progression.

## 🔧 What you'll find in EarthMc:
- 🧩 All mods made by CobbleStudio, combined in one pack
- 🌐 Optimized world generation to accommodate new blocks, ores, and structures
- ⚒️ An organized crafting system, with clear categories and fixed recipes
- 💎 Unique resources like rubies, now correctly generated
- 🖥️ A revamped graphical interface for better readability and immersion
  
## 🚀 Why choose EarthMc:
- ✅ Complete, stable, and ready-to-play modpack
- 🛠️ Ideal for testing, discovering, or playing with all CobbleStudio mods
- 📦 Easy to install and regularly updated
